obligations.name: LocalExistenceProof
requires: existence of slab solution from admissible initial data

obligations.name: LocalUniquenessProof
requires: uniqueness of slab solution in the selected solution class

obligations.name: ConstraintPropagationProof
requires: initial constraints remain true under evolution

obligations.name: GaugeControlProof
requires: selected gauge remains controlled on each slab

obligations.name: EnergyBootstrapProof
requires: bootstrap energy bound is propagated on a slab

obligations.name: RefinedEnergyEstimateProof
requires: assumed bootstrap bound improves to refined bound

obligations.name: BootstrapClosureProof
requires: refined estimate closes the bootstrap loop

obligations.name: MatterCouplingControlProof
requires: matter source terms stay controlled by the energy hierarchy

obligations.name: EnergyConditionPreservationProof
requires: selected energy condition persists under evolution

obligations.name: NonSymmetricPersistenceProof
requires: non-symmetric sector does not vanish or exit the admissible class

obligations.name: ConcentrationTransportProof
requires: initial concentration seed persists or strengthens along evolution

obligations.name: ContinuationAlternativeProof
requires: either regular continuation holds or threshold is reached

obligations.name: CollapseThresholdCriterionProof
requires: threshold condition is precisely defined and reachable

obligations.name: SlabIterationProof
requires: closed slab advances to the next slab

obligations.name: BootstrapSlabToSixFieldInstantiationProof
requires: analytic estimates fill all six-field slots

obligations.name: NonSymmetricEinsteinMatterBootstrapKernelAnalyticPackageProof
requires: kernel package fully instantiated from obligations 1-19

obligations.name: SixFieldAnalyticPackageHypothesisProof
requires: six-field analytic package follows from instantiated kernel

admissible_use: record all remaining six-field proof obligations after PR #442
preserve proof-target order before analytic estimates are supplied
prevent theorem promotion while obligations remain open
